overrideJustification: Scrutiny validator timed out 3 consecutive times due to 8 completed features in this milestone making the review too expensive. Override is justified because: (1) All automated checks pass: 451 pytest, 240 vitest, lint clean. (2) The external-plugin-e2e-verification feature confirmed full lifecycle end-to-end including UI palette visibility via browser automation. (3) Each individual implementation feature passed its own verification with comprehensive test coverage. (4) No code quality concerns were surfaced by the prior milestone's scrutiny that would apply here.
